case_title: TERESA TONG VS. WILLIAM DRESBACH III

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, TERESA AS TO DEFENDANT DRESBACH III, WILLIAM AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA SUNSET SAUNA & MASSAGE, AND DBA MASSAGE INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG, TERESA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRESBACH III, WILLIAM AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA SUNSET SAUNA & MASSAGE, AND DBA MASSAGE INC. $17,235.94 PRINCIPAL, $384.16 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,950.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
